name: TMA group list create and detail surfaces
description: Add Telegram Mini App group surfaces for listing personal and household groups, creating a group without avatar requirements, and viewing group detail with real worker group, summary, and group-filtered expense APIs.

planned: Reuse existing worker `/api/v1/groups` endpoints instead of adding TMA-specific API routes.
Add TMA `/groups`, `/groups/new`, and `/groups/:id` routes with lazy router wiring and Home shortcut access.
List personal groups with `GET /groups` and household groups with `GET /groups?household_id=...` for each joined household.
Create groups with `POST /groups`, no avatar field, and optional household context limited to admin households.
Render detail from `GET /groups/:id`, `GET /groups/:id/summary`, and recent expenses filtered by `group_id` plus household context when needed.
verification: `./init.sh lint` returned `OK` after restoring existing `HouseholdItem` footer usage required by its public `action` prop.
`jq empty harness/feature_index.json harness/features/feat-097.json` returned no output.

Final `gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: 'all', repo: 'household-finance-system')` reported `high` risk with 47 changed symbols, 6 affected processes, and 10 indexed changed files. The affected processes are concentrated in pre-existing TMA expense filter and period picker work already present in the dirty worktree; the group slice adds TMA route/path/shortcut wiring and new untracked group files.
Follow-up create group UI adjustment on 2026-06-07 passed `./init.sh typecheck` and `./init.sh lint` after making the context select taller and stacking start/end date fields into separate rows.

notes: Real Telegram WebView visual smoke remains pending because authenticated TMA launch context is required.
